description: Testing the visual and functional elements of the login screen interface, including layout, input fields, and message display.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display of screen:
+ Header
+ Title
+ Footer
+ Layout of items
+ State of each items
+ Mask input for Password item
+ Copy paste password
+ Position and format of Message area

item_type:
Login by Email
(the same with login by User name)
description: Testing email-based login functionality including validation of input fields, handling of different email formats, and error scenarios.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check login with blank Email & blank Password
Check login with blank Email or blank Password
Check successful login with registered Email
Check successful login with max/min lenght Email
Check successful login with max/min lenght password
Check login with TRIM(Email)
Check login with unregistered Email
Check login with incorrect Email
Check login with incorrect Password (not map with Email)

description: Testing mobile number-based login functionality including validation of input fields and error handling for various scenarios.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check login with blank mobile number & blank Password
Check login with blank mobile number OR blank Password
Check successful login with registered Mobile number
Check login with TRIM(mobile number)
Check successful login with max/min lenght password
Check login with unregistered mobile number
Check login with incorrect mobile number
Check login with incorrect Password (not map with mobile number)

description: Testing Facebook login functionality including first-time login, auto-login scenarios, token expiration, and various Facebook account states.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check login with configure id Facebook is added.
Check login with configure id Facebook is changed
expected_result: Can not login if edited id Facebook is allowed

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the first time login when registered account is online FB
expected_result: Can login successfully even if not input username/password

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the first time login when other account is online FB
expected_result: Handle auto login or can not login base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the first time login when all accounts are offline FB
expected_result:
Display Facebook login screen. 
Can login successfully after login FB by registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the first time login by FB account but not install FB app on device (PC/Mobile)
expected_result:
Display Facebook login screen (on Web version)
Can login successfully after login FB by registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the next time login when:
+ Not expired login token
+ Registered account is online FB

Check the next time login when:
+ Not expired login token
+ Registered account is offline FB

Check the next time login when:
+ Expired login token
+ Registered account is online FB
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the next time login when:
+ Expired login token
+ Registered account is offline FB
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the next time login after clear Cookies of browser
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the next time login after Logout
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the next time login on another Web browser
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Login with Facebook account which has Email and registed Email are the same
expected_result: Can login/can not login base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Login after removing your application from Facebook Application
Login after cancelling Read /Write Facebook permission
Login after changing the password of Facebook account
Login with Facebook account if user TURN OFF Application on Facebook

description: Testing Google login functionality including first-time login, auto-login scenarios, token expiration, and various Google account states.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the first time login when registered account is logging Google
expected_result: Can login successfully even if not input username/password

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the first time login when other account is logging Google
expected_result: Handle auto login or can not login base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the first time login when not login Google by any user (PC)
expected_result:
Display Google login screen. 
Can login successfully after login Google by registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the first time login by Google account but not add any GG account to device (Mobile)
expected_result:
Display Google login screen
Can login successfully after login Google by registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the next time login when:
+ Not expired login token
+ Registered account is logging Google

Check the next time login when:
+ Not expired login token
+ Registered account is not logging Google

Check the next time login when:
+ Expired login token
+ Registered account is logging Google
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the next time login when:
+ Expired login token
+ Registered account is not logging Google
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the next time login after clear Cookies of browser
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the next time login after Logout
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the next time login on another Web browser
expected_result: Can not auto login. Display login page. Can login successfully with Registered account

item_type: Login via another application (For example: WSM)
description: Testing login integration with other applications, including auto-login scenarios and handling of logged/non-logged states.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check login when required application is logged
Check login when required application is not logged
expected_result: Display login page of required application. Can login successfully after login by Registered account

description: Testing remember me functionality including session persistence, token expiration, and browser behavior.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Back to Login screen by Back button of browser
expected_result: Can not display login screen after logged successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Reopen Login screen by URL on other window after login
expected_result: Can not display login screen after logged successfully, display the default screen after login

test_view_points.viewpoint: Reopen any valid URL on other window after login
Check operation when ON remember Checkbox
expected_result: Keep login state until logout or expired date (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when OFF remember Checkbox
Not expired token
Expired login token
Clear /Edit Cookies
Logout
Log in by another Web browser

description: Testing special login scenarios including multi-device login, multiple accounts, and special account states.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Login on multi devices
expected_result: Can login/can not login base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Log in multi accounts on 1 device
expected_result: Can login/can not login base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Regist an account => login by related mobile number
expected_result: Can login/can not login base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Regist an account => login by related Email
expected_result: Can login/can not login base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Login by special account:
+ Deleted account
+ Inactive account
+ Block account
expected_result:
Can not login by this account.
Display corresponding error message
